mapper.select: SELECT * FROM market_order WHERE memberno = #{memberno} ORDER BY ORDER_ID DESC
SELECT * FROM dog WHERE memberno = #{memberno} ORDER BY dogno DESC
SELECT * FROM comments WHERE memberno = #{memberno} ORDER BY comment_no DESC
SELECT * FROM community WHERE memberno = #{memberno} ORDER BY communityno DESC

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM market_order WHERE memberno = #{memberno}) AS ORDER_CNT,
(SELECT NVL(SUM(total_price), 0) FROM market_order WHERE memberno = #{memberno}) AS TOTAL_PRICE,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dog WHERE memberno = #{memberno}) AS DOG_CNT,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE memberno = #{memberno}) AS COMMENT_CNT,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM community WHERE memberno = #{memberno}) AS POST_CNT FROM dual
SELECT C.* FROM market_cart C JOIN member M ON C.MEMBER_ID = M.ID WHERE M.MEMBERNO = #{memberno} ORDER BY C.CART_ID DESC
SELECT MLOGINNO, IP, TO_CHAR(LOGINDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS LOGINDATE FROM mlogin WHERE MEMBERNO = #{memberno} ORDER BY MLOGINNO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dog (dogno, memberno, name, age, breed) VALUES (dog_seq.nextval, #{memberno}, #{name}, #{age}, #{breed})
